caption: A man with long dark hair tied back and glasses performs music in a room with wood-slatted walls. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark blue embroidered vest, and a decorative necklace with a red and white pendant. He holds an acoustic guitar and stands before a microphone on a black stand. In the background, the heads of a few audience members are partially visible. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position, slightly adjusting his head and expression while singing or speaking into the microphone. His posture remains steady, and the camera angle is fixed, capturing a medium shot of his upper body and the top of his instrument.
